project: build a complete clone of Space Invaders arcade, playable on

tasks.prompt: Create the HTML file with a canvas element and basic CSS to center the game on the screen.
Create the main JavaScript file to handle the game loop, canvas context, and keyboard input for movement.
Create a Player class that renders a simple rectangle or sprite and handles left/right movement within canvas bounds.
Create an Alien class and a Grid manager to render rows of aliens and handle their collective horizontal movement and drop-down behavior.
Create a Projectile class to handle player bullets moving upwards and enemy bullets moving downwards, including collision detection with aliens and the player.
Implement game over, win conditions, score tracking, and a restart mechanism to complete the gameplay loop.
